# UNNotificationContentExtensionResponseOption.doNotDismiss

**Case**

Don’t dismiss the notification interface.

## Declaration

```swift
case doNotDismiss
```

## Discussion

The content extension handles the selected action.

## Response Options

- **UNNotificationContentExtensionResponseOption.dismiss**: Dismiss the notification interface.
- **UNNotificationContentExtensionResponseOption.dismissAndForwardAction**: Dismiss the notification interface and forward the notification to the app.

items.description: Dismiss the notification interface and forward the notification to the app.
